title: rottlera rusciflora
intro: Rottlera rusciflora, also known as the Ruscus-leafed Rottlera, is a plant species that belongs to the family Celastraceae. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. The leaves and roots of Rottlera rusciflora contain flavonoids and other compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving liver function, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Rottlera rusciflora is often used as a decoction or infusion, and can also be processed into a powder or oil for topical application.
